INST1_LETTER_TO_DIGIT:
Letter-Digit Substitution Task You will see a row of letters at the top of the screen with numbers below them. Each letter has a 'code' number directly below it. Your task: Learn these codes. A test letter will appear in the center of the screen. Press the number key that matches that letter's code. Example: If 'J' is above '7', then when you see 'J', press '7'. Try to respond as quickly as possible without making errors.

Press any key to continue.
INST1_SYMBOL_TO_DIGIT:
Digit-Symbol Substitution Test You will see a row of symbols at the top of the screen with numbers (1-9) below them. Each symbol has a code number. Your task: Learn these symbol-number pairs. A test symbol will appear in the center of the screen. Click the number button that matches that symbol's code. Example: If the triangle symbol is above '7', then when you see the triangle, click '7'. Try to respond as quickly as possible without making errors.

Press any key to continue.
INST1_DIGIT_TO_LETTER:
Digit-Letter Substitution Task You will see a row of numbers (1-9) at the top of the screen with letters below them. Each number has a 'code' letter. Your task: Learn these codes. A test number will appear in the center of the screen. Click the letter button that matches that number's code. Example: If 'J' is below '7', then when you see '7', click 'J'. Try to respond as quickly as possible without making errors.

Press any key to continue.
INST1_DIGIT_TO_SYMBOL:
Digit-Symbol Substitution Test (Reverse) You will see a row of numbers (1-9) at the top of the screen with symbols below them. Each number has a code symbol. Your task: Learn these number-symbol pairs. A test number will appear in the center of the screen. Click the symbol button that matches that number's code. Example: If the triangle symbol is below '7', then when you see '7', click the triangle. Try to respond as quickly as possible without making errors.

Press any key to continue.
INST2:
Practice Trials First, you will complete practice trials. During practice, you will receive feedback on each trial. After practice, you will not be told whether you were correct or incorrect.

Press any key to begin practice.
PRACTICEDONE:
Practice Complete Practice is finished. The test will now begin.

Press any key to start.
DEBRIEF: Thank you for participating! You completed trials with correct (% accuracy). Your median response time was ms.
FOOTER_LETTER_TO_DIGIT_KEYBOARD: Press number key corresponding to letter
FOOTER_SYMBOL_TO_DIGIT_KEYBOARD: Press number key corresponding to symbol
FOOTER_LETTER_TO_DIGIT_CLICK: Click or touch number corresponding to letter
FOOTER_SYMBOL_TO_DIGIT_CLICK: Click or touch number corresponding to symbol
FOOTER_DIGIT_TO_LETTER: Click or touch letter corresponding to number
FOOTER_DIGIT_TO_SYMBOL: Click or touch symbol corresponding to number
